app.title: Dingovault
app.emptyTitle: This page is waiting for your ideas
app.emptySubtitle: Open another note from the palette, or create blocks on this page — every bullet is a first-class outline node.
app.emptyCtaBody: Press Ctrl+K (⌘K) to jump anywhere instantly.
app.hint: Ctrl+K palette · Tab / Shift+Tab indent · Cmd+Enter TODO cycle · / commands · Enter at end adds sibling · drag ⠿ to reorder · fold ▾ · checkboxes multi-select · mobile: swipe ← TODO · → clear
app.aboutBody: Local-first outliner with Markdown blocks, FTS search, and optional cloud sync. See the repository README for setup, SaaS mode, and security notes.

palette.placeholder: Jump to page or search blocks…
palette.emptyRecents: Open a page to build history — recents appear here.
palette.emptySearchHint: Try a shorter keyword, check spelling, or open a page from recents (clear the search box).
